assertion_results.text: Bug parsing correctly extracts all four required sections (Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) using the heading formats from bug-template-mock.md (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md contains all four required sections under '## Parsed Required Sections': '### Issue Description' (lines 30-35 with full description), '### Steps to Reproduce' (lines 37-47 with numbered steps), '### Expected Result' (lines 49-51 with expected behavior), and '### Actual Result' (lines 53-55 with actual behavior). All sections contain substantive, correctly extracted content.

assertion_results.text: Bug validation confirms the issue type ID (10020) matches the Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md line 15: 'Issue type ID `10020` matches Bug Configuration's Bug issue type ID `10020`. Validated as Bug.' The configuration table on line 9 also shows 'Bug issue type ID | 10020'.

assertion_results.text: Investigation identifies the trailing-whitespace heading extraction as the root cause — line[3:] does not strip whitespace (Steps 2-3)
assertion_results.evidence: investigation.md lines 17-19: 'The heading text is extracted using `line[3:]`, which captures everything after `## ` -- including any trailing whitespace characters.' Line 19: 'When a heading line contains trailing whitespace (e.g., `## Migration Patterns  \n`), the extracted section name becomes `"Migration Patterns  "` (with two trailing spaces) instead of `"Migration Patterns"`.' Line 55: 'section_name = line[3:]  # Does NOT strip trailing whitespace'. Lines 31-32 confirm: 'The bug is **confirmed by code-path analysis**: trailing whitespace on CONVENTIONS.md headings causes exact-match failure in convention lookup.'

assertion_results.text: Root cause comment includes: what is broken (heading extraction does not strip trailing whitespace), where it is broken (plan-feature convention lookup), and how to verify the fix (reproducer test with whitespace in heading) (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: root-cause.md line 9 - What is broken: 'extracts CONVENTIONS.md section headings using `line[3:]`, which captures all characters after `## ` including any trailing whitespace'. Where it is broken: 'plan-feature skill's convention conformance analysis' with affected files listing 'plugins/sdlc-workflow/skills/plan-feature/SKILL.md -- convention conformance analysis section (heading extraction logic using `line[3:]`)'. How to verify: Reproducer Strategy section (lines 24-29): 'Create a `CONVENTIONS.md` fixture file with trailing whitespace on one or more section headings. Run the plan-feature convention loading logic against this fixture and assert that: The convention section is found and included...'

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST acceptance criterion — before any fix criteria (Step 5 Acceptance Criteria ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 58-62, under '## Acceptance Criteria': First item is '- [ ] A reproducer test exists that creates a CONVENTIONS.md with trailing whitespace on headings, runs the convention extraction logic, and verifies the convention is correctly matched and included in the task output (fails before fix, passes after)'. This precedes the fix criteria: '- [ ] The convention heading extraction logic strips trailing whitespace from extracted section names' and subsequent items.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST test requirement — with explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce (Step 5 Test Requirements ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 64, under '## Test Requirements': First item is '- [ ] Reproducer test: create a `CONVENTIONS.md` fixture with trailing whitespace on a `## Migration Patterns  ` heading, run convention extraction, and assert the convention is found under key `"Migration Patterns"` (without trailing spaces) and appears in the generated task's Implementation Notes as `Per CONVENTIONS.md "Migration Patterns: ...`'. This is first, and includes explicit assertion guidance (assert key is found without trailing spaces, assert it appears in Implementation Notes) derived from the Steps to Reproduce.

assertion_results.text: Task description includes a Bug Context section with Bug key (ACME-500), Steps to Reproduce, Expected/Actual Result, and Root Cause summary (Step 5 Bug Context extension)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 73-79 contain '## Bug Context' with all required elements: Bug key '- **Bug**: [ACME-500](https://mock-jira.example.com/browse/ACME-500)', Steps to Reproduce '- **Steps to Reproduce**: Create a CONVENTIONS.md with trailing whitespace on a heading...', Expected Result '- **Expected Result**: The generated task's Implementation Notes should include the convention reference...', Actual Result '- **Actual Result**: The convention is silently dropped from Implementation Notes. No warning is shown.', Root Cause summary '- **Root Cause**: Heading extraction uses `line[3:]` without stripping trailing whitespace...'

assertion_results.text: Task description sets Target Branch to main (Step 5 Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 11-12: '## Target Branch' followed by 'main'.

assertion_results.text: Task description output includes ai-generated-jira in the Jira API metadata block showing it would be passed as a label to jira.create_issue (Step 5 Task creation)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 1-6 contain the Jira API metadata block: '<!-- Jira API Metadata: jira.create_issue parameters -->' with '<!-- labels: ["ai-generated-jira"] -->' on line 4, showing the label would be passed to jira.create_issue.
